feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 91,770Chapters: 60/?Kudos: 30

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

  • Major Character Death

entry.title: The Shape of Truth
entry.summary:
Author: Joy_peace

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,109Chapters: 4/8Kudos: 24

Summary: Arthur has always trusted Merlin—just not for the reasons Merlin thinks. When Camelot’s peace fractures and something ancient begins to stir, secrets long held in silence begin to surface…and not all of them belong to Merlin.

entry.title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Time
entry.summary:
Author: HarmonyOfTheSpheres

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 73,083Chapters: 19/21Kudos: 676

Summary: Merlin has returned to Hogwarts for his second year as the History of Magic professor, and this time he is determined to find a way to destroy the horcrux within Harry before it's too late. It's not exactly a simple task, however, especially with an escaped convict on the loose and dementors lurking around Hogwarts' grounds. So when Merlin finally gets a chance to change Harry's fate, he takes it.A bit of time travel is surely worth the risk if it will save Harry's life—isn't it?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Absolution of the Son
entry.summary:
Author: LadyWhistleClown

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,560Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 52

Summary: Arthur is angry when he learns that he is born of magic and that his Father sacrificed his Mother so he could have an heir. In this version of events, Merlin doesn't tell Arthur that Morgause lied to him. Arthur must confront his Father and face Camelot's history of discriminatory anti-magic policies head on, including his own role in them. All while he feels himself slowly drawn closer and closer to his manservant Merlin. Meanwhile, Merlin must continue to keep his magic secret and work in the shadows for the better future with Arthur he's been promised is his destiny.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: only fools want to be great
entry.summary:
Author: shatteredwriters

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,275Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 15

Summary: “For you, sire.” The woman said in a voice high and melodic. “As a token of our appreciation.”In her palm lay a smooth, black stone, perfectly round, golden tendrils like lightning bolts racing across the surface.Arthur raised his eyebrows.“It’s…lovely.”The old woman held the stone out to the prince. As he reached for it, she seized his wrist with her other hand, forcefully pushing the stone into his palm. Startled, Arthur tried to yank his hand away but she held firm.“It is for luck, sire.” Her gaze transfixed the prince, and he could neither move nor speak. “May it bring you the fortune you deserve.” A mysterious gift leads Arthur into a fight for his life.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: No more sugarcoating
entry.summary:
Author: wimdsy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,008Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 61

Summary: Basic premise is the Lamia episode, but if it were more violent and Arthur and Merlin were gayer. I don't know how long I am going to make this fic, or when I will post chapters. But I will try to be consistent. I'm bad at summaries, just look at the tags and decide if you want to read it for yourself.

entry.title: With you, time and time again
entry.summary:
Author: BookiePookies25

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,267Chapters: 5/20Kudos: 119

Summary: “This is a destiny of your own making, Arthur Pendragon. Whether you regret it or not is of no consequence. You have offered your soul, and it is a promise you cannot break.” After Arthur dies, a mysterious force throws Merlin and Arthur back in time, right to when they first met. Burdened by memories, overstrung by knowledge, they navigate an unfamiliar Camelot while trying to ease back into their comfortable dynamic before the revelation of Merlin's magic. But nothing’s ever easy. For one, Merlin has the unnerving skill to dive head first into trouble, and this time round Arthur know enough not to be completely oblivious. Are their memories enough to help them usher in the promised golden age? And what do events from a thousand years ago have to do with everything? OrIn which we attempt to untangle the emotional trauma that was Merlin’s life, the messed up but precious friendship that was Merlin and Arthur, and the character injustice that was Morgana. OrHow destiny was made

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Two Ends of a Short Leash
entry.summary:
Author: b0rtney (b00mgh)

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,310Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 31

Summary: Remember when Morgana hired a 14-year-old (Daegal was his name) to lure Merlin into a ditch for her to poison him? And then the kid has a change of heart and helps Merlin and dies at the end of the episode? All this while the guy who held Morgana and Aithusa captive is chilling at a feast with Arthur? What if Daegal decided to help Merlin by finding Arthur? What if that evil dignitary died instead? Or: Percival has one (1) thought, Morgana and Gwen are complicated, Gaius has a help wanted sign in the window, and Arthur is so glad he knows about at least two plants.

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,273Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 18

entry.title: Amber and Wild Thyme
entry.summary:
Author: Ginkgo_Biloba_Baggins

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,951Chapters: 13/33Kudos: 366

Summary: When Hunith arrives in Camelot with news of an attack, Merlin knows what he has to do. He is perfectly capable of driving away the likes of Kanen’s men by himself; he has been defending Ealdor since he was ten years old. However, he has no idea of the lengths Arthur will go to to protect his poor, misguided manservant - such as adopting a disguise and following him home. A Canon Era AU of S1 E10 The Moment of Truth

entry.title: An Impractical Wager
entry.summary:
Author: theletters

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,699Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 78

Summary: “After everything—an entire day of purposefully trying to tick him off—this was what Arthur was getting angry over?” Merlin meets How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days. When Gwaine implies Merlin has it easy working for Arthur, Merlin sets out to prove him wrong, job security be damned. But no matter how hard he tries, Arthur won’t fire him—and when he breaks, it’s for a reason Merlin could never have expected.

entry.title: was it you, midst the fire and the embers?
entry.summary:
Author: theleftoveryou

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,202Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 63

Summary: This is not how things were supposed to go, and he is not supposed to be here alone, and he is not supposed to mind being alone, only he does, and it’s all Merlin’s fault. Merlin, who has worked his way past all of Arthur’s defenses, into his life and into his heart. That, he supposes, is what sorcerers do. ---------- A confession of magic. And, perhaps, a confession of something else.

entry.title: Don’t Follow Me (I Can’t Bear to Look)
entry.summary:
Author: Gwenifara_Fae

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,830Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 20

Summary: Arthur asks Gwen to marry him and Merlin decides he can’t bear to watch his best friend marry the love of his life and leaves.After reading Merlin’s note, Arthur mistakenly believes Merlin is in love with Gwen and must decide between chasing after the best friend he’s ever had, and potentially loosing his fiancé.Morgana’s snide comments are helping no one. Gwaine won’t leave Merlin alone.

entry.title: now promise you'll be good
entry.summary:
Author: urmomsboyfriend

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,477Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 215

Summary: Merlin hums, making Arthur look back at him and Gods—Arthur already knows what he’s going to say even before his plush lips can grace the shape of the syllables. And yet, it hits him all the same, the gut punch of words delivered by a man whose praise seems worth its weight in gold. Merlin leans in closer, breath almost ghosting along Arthur’s skin as the binds come undone. “Good boy.” . All the times Merlin calls Arthur a good boy and the times Arthur seeks it out, then what happens when the praise stops.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

  • Hair-pulling
  • arthur lowkey serving subtop vibes
  • gratuitous focus on merlins neck

entry.title: your love is sunlight
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,547Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 5

Summary: Merlin didn’t look at either of them when he said it. “I don’t feel like myself.”

entry.title: Whatever you Need
entry.summary:
Author: THELASTDRAGON

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,363Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 22

Summary: Arthur at his core was a Romantic, he has been waiting for the day he would meet his soulmate since he was young, but when his soulmate rejects him Arthur finds he would do anything to win him over.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Among The Wildflowers
entry.summary:
Author: YellingAtPlants

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,874Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 87

Summary: Part three of the Where the Quiet Things Grow saga·༻𐫱༺·Post Not All Dragons and Dandelions, a direct continuation of Beneath the Roses (though can be read without reading either)·༻𐫱༺· After a disastrous confrontation with his father, Arthur Pendragon finds himself on the run with his soulmate. He learns that really, he knew absolutely nothing before Merlin came into his life, everyone he thought were his enemies are friends, his friends are all cruel people (one more princess joke Gwaine... see what happens) and his sister is a meddling witch. No, really. Oh, and apparently his soulmate is a god. ·༻𐫱༺· A story of subterfuge, humour, falling in love, overthrowing a tyrant king and cheese that tastes like apple pies... or something like that.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
